name: Your Name
role: Your role — e.g. Data Scientist, Product Manager, Founder
bio: 2-3 sentences about who you are, what you do, and what you believe. Be specific — this gets injected into every post.
target_audience: Who you are writing for — e.g. ML engineers, founders, designers

projects.name: Project name
projects.description: What you built and what it did — include real numbers if you have them

opinions: A strong opinion you hold about your field — not a fact, an actual take
phrases_i_use: Natural phrases you say — e.g. 'Here is the thing', 'Nobody tells you this'
technical_voice_notes: Describe how you specifically explain technical things — e.g. 'I always use real numbers not vague claims'
e.g. 'I reference my actual experience not hypotheticals'
e.g. 'I acknowledge when something is hard instead of making it sound easy'
linkedin_style_notes: Describe your LinkedIn style — e.g. hook in first line, short paragraphs, end with opinion not CTA
medium_style_notes: Describe your Medium style if different
writing_samples: Paste one of your real past LinkedIn posts here — full text
Paste a third one here — the more the better
